name: cross-margin-view
description: Phase 4 prime broker view: take a borrower with two collateral positions (sovereign bond and stablecoin) and one open loan in USDC. Render the unified margin summary — haircut-adjusted collateral pool, projected liability with simple interest, net free margin per cash mint. Demonstrates the cross-asset risk netting story that single-protocol systems cannot produce.
headline: One borrower, two collateral mints, one cross-mint loan: see haircut-adjusted free margin in one read-only call.

steps.explanation: Initialize the RiskParams PDA (one-time per deployment). Sets the governance-mutable haircut table.
(Optional) Tighten the EQUITY-class haircut from the 30% default to 45%. Demonstrates governance-mutable risk parameters.
Read the current haircut table to confirm. No keypair needed for read-only commands.

Assume the borrower already deposited 500_000 units of MINT_SOVEREIGN as collateral via `ssr-cli vault deposit ...` and opened a loan via `ssr-cli lending open ...` (these flows are covered by `dvp-happy-path` + later scenarios). Now read the unified margin view across both collateral mints.
(Optional — when Pyth is bound) Refresh the collateral feed from Pyth and re-read margin. Demonstrates the oracle-driven dial.
steps.command: ssr-cli compliance update-price-from-pyth --mint <MINT_SOVEREIGN> && ssr-cli margin show --user <BORROWER_PUBKEY> --mint <MINT_SOVEREIGN> --mint <MINT_USDC>
